mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that reduces discount rates for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in periods of FEDFUNDS decline are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in the unemployment rate above 10% signals deteriorating labor market conditions, prompting risk-off behavior that drives S&P 500 forward returns negative over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns remain positive despite UNRATE exceeding 10% threshold or predictive power vanishes (Rank IC < 0.02).

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in industrial production and real GDP indicate weakening supply-side capacity, creating deflationary risks that depress equity valuations and produce negative S&P 500 returns over 60 days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are positive when both INDPRO and GDPC1 decline or interaction effect size < 0.15 in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: A surge in housing starts above 600k units signals strong consumer demand, boosting corporate earnings expectations and generating positive S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are negative when HOUST exceeds 600k or predictive accuracy drops below 55% in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A divergence between rising CPI and stagnant FEDFUNDS signals inflationary pressures, prompting central bank tightening that drives S&P 500 returns negative over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are positive during CPI-FEDFUNDS divergence or interaction effect size < 0.1 in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in payroll employment below 100k net additions signals recessionary labor market dynamics, producing negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are positive when PAYEMS < 100k or predictive power falls below 50% in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in real sales (RSAFS) above $350B signals robust consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days through earnings momentum.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative when RSAFS exceeds 350B or Rank IC < 0.04 in rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp drop in industrial production below 90% of its 2017 peak indicates supply chain disruptions, creating inflationary pressures that drive S&P 500 returns negative over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are positive when INDPRO falls below 90% or predictive accuracy drops below 55% in walk-forward tests.
